character_buff.name: Despertarse
character_buff.description: Awakens the physical ability with a shot to announce preparation for battle.

effects: Duration: 600 seconds
ATK against monster +50%
Physical Penetration +15
Inflicts [Critical Wound] through normal attacks (DEF -2 per level, Melee attack damage +10%)

stances.name: Destello

skills.name: Disparo
skills.description: Fire quick shots at distant enemies.

effects: Ignores 30 DEF
With every 3rd successful skill, ignores DEF by an additional 50 + (extra [STR] * 2)
30% chance to inflict [Mortal Wound]
Damage increases by (400% + extra [STR] * 8%) against enemies affected by [Mortal Wound] (or [Critical Wound], but only if the enemys a monster)
Ignores Debuff RES
Recharge Duration: 20 seconds
Can be used up to 2 times
Re-charge when used over 1 time
[Estarildo] level +1 with every successful skill (Max. Lv.3)
